name: nkeys2_exp041
hypothesis: DIFFICULTY test: is the partial-retrieval ceiling task-difficulty-bound? Every prior config used n_keys=4 or 8 (recall 0). At n_keys=2, only 2 distractors, so the ~14%/digit partial-retrieval signal (exp038) should be much stronger — possibly enough for exact recall. If recall>0 emerges -> the ceiling is difficulty-relative (easier tasks break it; the search reopens with difficulty-aware configs). If still 0.30/0.0 -> the CE-only loss is DEFINITIVELY the ceiling regardless of difficulty (handoff final). Direct comparison to exp001 (n_keys=4, 0.296/0.0). Config-only, ~18 min.
